# Sort and group

## Sort by due date ascending

```tasks
not done
has due date
sort by due
```

## Sort by due reverse

```tasks
not done
has due date
sort by due reverse
```

## Sort by priority then due

```tasks
not done
sort by priority
sort by due
```

## Group by folder

```tasks
not done
group by folder
```

## Group by status

```tasks
group by status
```

## Group by priority (sort within group by due)

```tasks
not done
group by priority
sort by due
```

## Group by tags

```tasks
not done
group by tags
```
